game.title: El tesoro perdido
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango found an old treasure map - follow the clues to find the treasure!

mechanics.core_loop: Read map clues and tap landmarks in the correct order to find the treasure

controls.tap: Tap on landmarks to select them as next step

examples: Gira a la derecha hasta la roca
El tesoro está cerca de las flores

visuals.background: Old parchment/map style with landmarks scattered
visuals.landmarks: Emoji icons on map grid, glow when tappable
visuals.path: Dotted line showing progress through clues
visuals.treasure: Chest emoji appears at final destination
visuals.clue_display: Scroll or speech bubble with current clue

instructions_text: ¡Sigue las pistas del mapa! Toca los lugares en el orden correcto para encontrar el tesoro.
implementation_notes: Each sequence is array of landmark IDs in order
Clues generated based on sequence (directional language)
Highlight current clue, dim completed steps
Show path line connecting visited landmarks
Wrong tap = flash red, lose attempt, can retry step
Good for teaching Spanish direction words
